title.en: In an instant, the powerful creatures around th...

content.en:
Ye Tian cast the Devouring Domain, instantly devouring the power of these creatures, easily crushing them.

In an instant, the powerful creatures around them were killed.

Seeing this, the Ten Elements Ancestor gasped.

He knew that Ye Tian was very powerful, but he didn't expect it to be so terrifying.

"This is the strength of the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, it's too powerful, an ordinary half-step perfect controller is like an ant!"

The Ten Elements Ancestor muttered.

In fact, he thought that his strength was not bad, and he was also very powerful among ordinary half-step perfect controllers, and he was not too far away from the top half-step perfect controllers.

But now compared to his little apprentice Ye Tian, there is nothing to compare!

"Master, what the hell is going on?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Ten Elements Ancestor immediately told the situation of the Ten Thousand Dragons Palace, and some of his own guesses were also said.

"Ye Tian, according to my understanding, the Ten Thousand Dragons Hall seemed to have found something in the depths of the Yang Yan Forbidden Land before, and then this area was immediately blocked, and then we were brought in here and used as cannon fodder. Obviously, they had discovered an incomparably precious treasure in the depths of the Yang Yan Forbidden Land, otherwise they would not have sacrificed so many half-step perfect controllers. The number of half-step perfect controllers in the Ten Thousand Dragon Hall is not very large, only thousands, and this time more than a hundred half-step perfect controllers were sacrificed at once, which is also a huge loss. I don't think they'd do it without a huge gain. Moreover, it must be very urgent, for fear of being discovered by others. The Ten Elements Ancestor guessed.

"Oh, to be able to make a force like the Ten Thousand Dragons Hall sacrifice so many half-step perfect controllers, just to be cannon fodder, I'm afraid it's an incomparably amazing treasure!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

And this time, the Ten Thousand Dragons Hall wanted to sacrifice his master Venerable Ten Elements Ancestor, and he was naturally extremely angry.

So, he had to get a kick in the mix.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian put the Ten Elements Ancestor into the Void Ball, put it in his body, and immediately went to the depths of the Yang Yan Forbidden Land.

Swish!

In an instant, Ye Tian came to the depths of the Yang Yan Forbidden Land.

Here, he sensed some powerful creatures, and also sensed the presence of the Wyvern Controller.

At this moment, the Wyvern Controller is fighting some powerful creatures while collecting the golden flowers here.

When Ye Tian saw these golden flowers, he immediately looked shocked.

"Extreme Matter!"

It's not surprising that there are pole-making substances here, after all, there are many places where pole-making substances are born, but there are too many pole-making materials here, even if they are forces like Wudao Tower, they will be tempted by the pole-making materials here!

If it can be born all the time, then this is a natural treasure land, even no less than the value of the golden river.

"No wonder the Ten Thousand Dragons Hall is so eager to take away the treasures here, and is willing to sacrifice so many half-step perfect controllers. For them, the Extreme Creation Substance is much more valuable than those ordinary half-step perfect controllers. If the Ten Thousand Dragons Hall can cultivate a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, maybe it can lead the Ten Thousand Dragons Hall to a new peak in the future!"

Although Ye Tian understood the plan of the Ten Thousand Dragons Palace, sacrificing his master, this matter angered him.

"These golden flower creation materials, I want them!"

Ye Tian decided.

Wow!

Ye Tian passed and came to the front of the Flying Dragon Controller.

The flying dragon controller was shocked, he didn't know Ye Tian, but Ye Tian could easily come here, and his strength was bound to be not simple.

Fortunately, Ye Tian is not a perfect controller, so at most he is a peak half-step perfect controller, he is not afraid.

However, something happened here, and he immediately informed his father, the Lord of the Tyrannosaurus, to come over.

But at this time, Ye Tian made a move.

Rumble!!!!

A terrifying aura erupted from Ye Tian's body, and these aura contained the power of creation.

At this moment, the Wyvern Controller was stunned.

"Half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm!!"

How rare is the half-step perfect controller of the Eternal Ruins Creation Realm, how did he meet one?

It would have been enough if he had encountered it normally, but it happened when he was about to obtain so many extreme substances.

"My father is the Lord of the Tyrannosaurus!"

The Wyvern Controller said.

However, Ye Tian was not afraid of the Lord of the Tyrannosaurus at all.

I saw Ye Tian pinching it casually, directly pinching the controller of the flying dragon to death, and immediately took all the golden flowers on his body.

And the body of the Wyvern Controller is not a clone, but a real body.

As a result, the Wyvern Master fell directly.

The Tyrannosaurus Lord who was about to arrive knew that his son had fallen, and immediately roared angrily, shaking endless time and space.

In a flash.

The Lord of the Tyrannosaurus arrived and stepped into the forbidden land of the sun.

Bang!!!

The terrifying aura permeated, shocking many of the half-step perfect controllers of the Ten Thousand Dragons Palace.

The lords of the tyrannosaurus are here, is this what happened?

Now.

In the depths of the Yang Yan Forbidden Land, Ye Tian met with the Lord of the Tyrannosaurus.

"Kill me!"

The Lord of the Tyrannosaurus regretted it, if he had known, he would have directly snatched the Extreme Creation Material here, even if it was discovered by the other five perfect controllers of the Ten Thousand Dragon Palace, it would be a big deal to send them away.

As a result, it was he who wanted to occupy all the Extreme Matter, which led to the fall of his son.

"The perfect master!"

Ye Tian's eyes condensed slightly, it was the first time for him to fight with a perfect controller, fortunately, he was not a half-step perfect controller who had just broken through to the Extreme Creation Realm, he had still cultivated for a period of time, and he had also created a Perfection Control Technique, and the weaker Perfect Controller was still stronger.

But it's not the opponent of the Lord of the Tyrannosaurus, so you have to fight to know.

Rumble!!!

The golden light on Ye Tian's body was dense all over his body, and the top perfect control technique of a gate blessed his whole body, and he immediately fought with the Lord of the Tyrannosaurus.

Suddenly, the battle began.

Thundered!!!

Ye Tian and the Lord of the Tyrannosaurus continued to fight, and one of Ye Tian's will clones also came here, in fact, when he discovered the golden flower of the extreme substance, Ye Tian let the will clone come.

After all, this is a large amount of extreme material, and he naturally wants to take it all.

"Half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm!"

The Lord of the Tyrannosaurus was also taken aback.

Obviously, Ye Tian was definitely not a half-step perfect controller of ordinary forces, otherwise he would not be able to reach the realm of a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm.

But no matter what force Ye Tian came from, he would not let Ye Tian go.

At the beginning, Ye Tian was indeed suppressed by the Lord of the Tyrannosaurus, and the strength of the other party was indeed very strong.

Suddenly, Ye Tian unleashed the Perfect Control Technique, the Ten Thousand Dao Blade.

The Ten Thousand Dao Blades containing the power of Extreme Creation carried the golden light of Extreme Creation, tearing apart the Tyrannosaurus Lord's top perfect control technique, the Tyrannosaurus Holy Armor Defense, and injuring the Tyrannosaurus Lord with one blow.

Moreover, the damage caused by the Perfect Mastery Skill is not easy to recover.

"Perfect Mastery!"

The Lord of the Tyrannosaurus also recognized it, and immediately felt that it was difficult to do.

He doesn't seem to be able to win against Ye Tian!

On the other side, Ye Tian's will clone took away the golden flowers one by one.

He had to delay as long as he could, and try to get all the gold flowers here.

At the same time, the other five perfect controllers of the Ten Thousand Dragons Hall also arrived.
